translations.### 使用 Firebase Firestore + Functions 快速: ### Quickly Build a Testable API Service Using Firebase Firestore + Functions
translations.### 回歸主題，推播統計\n\n: ### Back to the Topic: Push Notification Statistics
translations.***以後的每次修改都記得要回來下 `firebase deploy` 指令，才: ***Remember to run the `firebase deploy` command after every change to apply the updates.***
translations.***價格可能隨時更改，請以官網最新資訊為準。***\n\n: ***Prices may change at any time. Please refer to the official website for the latest information.***
translations.**一個文檔一秒只能寫入一次** ，所以當按讚的人一多；同時請求下可能會變得很慢: **A single document can only be written once per second**, so when many people like a post, simultaneous requests may become slow.
translations.**可以回 Firebase -&gt; Firestore 查看結果是否有 L: **You can check Firebase -> Firestore to see if there is any Loss Data:**
translations.*Cloud Functions 針對運算時間資源提供永久免費方案，當中包含 G: *Cloud Functions offers a permanent free tier for compute time resources, including GB-seconds and GHz-seconds of compute time. Besides 2 million invocations, the free tier also provides 400,000 GB-seconds and 200,000 GHz-seconds of compute time, along with 5 GB of internet egress per month.*
translations.*Firebase Functions 必須啟用 Blaze 專案（用多少、付多: *Firebase Functions requires enabling a Blaze project (pay-as-you-go) to use.*
translations.*POST Body 記得選擇 `x-www-form-urlencoded`: *Remember to select `x-www-form-urlencoded` for the POST Body.*
translations.*p.s 如果你出現 brew: command not found 請先安裝: *p.s If you get brew: command not found, please install the [brew](https://brew.sh/index_zh-tw){:target="_blank"} package manager first*:
translations.*之前寫過一篇關於 Google Functions 的文章「 [使用 Pyth: *Previously wrote an article about Google Functions: "[Using Python + Google Cloud Platform + Line Bot to Automate Routine Tasks](../70a1409b149a/)"*
translations.*依個人需求安裝，我有裝但沒有用．．．因為只是小功能而已。*\n\n: *Install according to your needs. I installed it but didn't use it... because it's just a small feature.*
translations.*另外，後來想想一次出去同時回來的情境，數量可能沒有想像中的大；因為發推播也不會: *Also, thinking about the scenario where requests go out and come back at the same time, the volume might not be as large as expected; since push notifications are not sent all at once in hundreds of thousands or millions, but rather in small batches; it just needs to handle the number of requests sent and returned in batches!*
translations.*因為對 node.js 用法不太熟悉，一開始摸索的時候在 add 資料時沒加上: *Because I was not very familiar with node.js usage, at first when adding data I forgot to add `await`. Combined with write speed limits, this caused data loss under high traffic conditions…*
translations.*目前測試下來 APP 的 Loss 率應該是 0%，實際常見應用像是 Line: *Currently, the app's loss rate is estimated to be 0% based on tests. Common real-world applications include Line's end-to-end encryption for messages (push notifications are encrypted and only decrypted on the device before display).*
translations.*詳細原理及實作方式可參考之前的文章：「 [i **OS ≥ 10 Notifi: *For detailed principles and implementation, please refer to the previous article: "[i **OS ≥ 10 Notification Service Extension Application (Swift)**](../cb6eba52a342/)"*
translations.*這邊可以以 log 寫檔案方式做紀錄，要查詢時在自行做統計顯示。*\n\n: *Here you can record logs by writing to files, and perform statistics for display when querying.*
translations.- Language selection \"**JavaScript**\"\:
- Language selection "**JavaScript**"

- Regarding "use ESLint to catch probable bugs and enforce style" syntax style checking, **YES / NO both are acceptable**.

- install dependencies with npm? **YES**

translations.- `-c 100`: 100 tasks running concurrent:
- `-c 100`: 100 tasks running concurrently

- `-r 1`: Each task executes 1 request

- `-H 'Content-Type: application/json'`: Required when using POST requests

- `‘https://us-central1-project.cloudfunctions.net/post/like/id POST {}’`: POST URL, Post Body (ex: `{“name”:”1234”}` )

translations.> Create an API to add, update, delete,: > Create an API to add, update, delete, query articles, and like posts
translations.APP 端的功其實不大，iOS/Android 都只要實作類似的功能（但 And: The app side doesn't actually require much work. Both iOS and Android just need to implement similar features (but for Android, if targeting the Chinese market, it gets more complicated as you need to implement push notification frameworks for multiple platforms). The bigger challenge lies in handling backend and server load because each push notification triggers API calls to record data, which can easily max out the server's connections. This issue can be worse if using RDBMS to store records. Most data loss in statistics usually happens at this stage.
translations.Functions 還可以串 Authentication(身份驗證)、Stor: Functions can also integrate with Authentication and Storage, but I haven't explored those parts.
translations.Post Man 打成功後可以再到 Firebase -> Firestore: After a successful Postman request, you can check Firebase -> Firestore to see if the data was written correctly:
translations.[Firebase Firestore](https://firebase.go: [Firebase Firestore](https://firebase.google.com/docs/firestore){:target="_blank"}, a NoSQL database used to store and manage data.
translations.[Firebase Functions](https://firebase.go: [Firebase Functions](https://firebase.google.com/docs/functions){:target="_blank"} is basically Google Cloud Functions but only supports JavaScript (node.js). I haven't tried it, but if you use Google Cloud Functions with other languages and import Firebase services, it should also work.
translations.[Functions](https://developers.google.co: [Functions](https://developers.google.com/learn/topics/functions){:target="_blank"} is a serverless service provided by Google. You only need to write the program logic, and Google automatically handles the server, runtime environment, and scaling without worrying about server expansion or traffic issues.

```
You're about to initialize a Firebase project in this directory:

translations.下 `firebase deploy` 部署成功後，回到 Post Man 測試: After successfully deploying with `firebase deploy`, return to Post Man to test:
translations.並可在 Firebase -> Functions -> 紀錄中查看 log 結: You can view the log results in Firebase -> Functions -> Logs:
translations.之前曾聽說某個蠻大的服務就是使用 Firebase 服務搭建起家，結果後期資料、: I once heard that a fairly large service was built using Firebase. However, as data and traffic grew, the costs skyrocketed. Migrating was very difficult—code was manageable, but data was extremely hard to move. It’s a case of saving a little money early on but causing huge losses later, not worth it.
translations.以上就是分散出欄位來紀錄 Count 避免寫入太慢；但如果分散的欄位太多會增加讀: This is how distributing fields to record Counts avoids slow writes; however, having too many distributed fields increases read costs ($$), but it should still be cheaper than adding a new record for every like.
translations.修改＆儲存完成後回到 console 下：\n\n: After editing and saving, return to the console:
translations.假設我們的文章資料現在多一個 `likeCount` 欄位紀錄按讚數量，那我們該: Assuming our article data now has an additional `likeCount` field to record the number of likes, how should we handle it?
translations.再來就可以使用 `nvm install node` 安裝最新版的 node.j: Next, you can use `nvm install node` to install the latest version of node.js.
translations.別忘了參考 Firebase Functions & Firestore 的定價: Don't forget to refer to the pricing strategy of Firebase Functions & Firestore.
translations.到 NVM Github 專案複製安裝 shell script：\n\n: Copy the installation shell script from the NVM Github project:
translations.前往上述記下的路徑，找到 `functions 資料夾` ，用編輯器打開裡面的: Go to the previously noted path, find the `functions` folder, and open the `index.js` file inside with an editor.
translations.另外也做了個介面統計推播數字。\n\n: Also created an interface to track push notification statistics.
translations.可下 `npm --version` 確認 npm 安裝成功、安裝版本：\n\n: You can run `npm --version` to confirm that npm is installed successfully and check its version:
translations.可在本地環境測試 Functions、Firestore 功能及設定，不會算在使: You can test Functions and Firestore features and settings in your local environment. This does not count toward usage and does not require deployment to test.
translations.可能需要稍等一下， `Deploy complete!` 後你的第一個 Requ: You might need to wait a moment. After `Deploy complete!`, your first Request & Response webpage will be ready!
translations.回到一開始我們想做的，推播統計功能。\n\n: Back to what we originally wanted to do: the push notification statistics feature.
translations.因原先有問題中的考量，後端需要花功力研究修改且市場也不一定在意做出來的成效；所以: Due to the issues considered earlier, the backend requires significant effort to research and modify, and the market may not necessarily care about the results; so I decided to first use available resources to create a prototype to test the waters.
translations.因為以上原因，使用 Firebase Functions + Firestore: For the above reasons, I personally recommend using Firebase Functions + Firestore API services only for testing or prototype product demos.
translations.在 iOS 10 之後可以透過實踐 Notification Service E: After iOS 10, you can implement a Notification Service Extension to secretly call an API for statistics at the moment the push notification banner appears. The advantage is high accuracy since the call only happens when the user actually sees the notification banner. If the app is deleted, notifications are turned off, or banners are disabled, no action occurs. The banner appearance equals a received notification, which can be used as the push base count. Combining this with click counts allows you to get an "accurate click-through rate."
translations.執行完成後可看到執行結果：\n\n: After execution, you can see the results:
translations.如同標題所寫「可供測試」、「可供測試」、「可供測試」不太建議將以上服務用於正式環: As stated in the title, "for testing purposes," "for testing purposes," "for testing purposes," it is not recommended to use the above services in a production environment or as the core of a product launch.
translations.如果安裝過程出現錯誤，請確認有 `~/.bashrc` 或 `~/.zshrc`: If you encounter errors during installation, please make sure you have a `~/.bashrc` or `~/.zshrc` file. If not, create one using `touch ~/.bashrc` or `touch ~/.zshrc` and then run the install script again.
translations.安裝成功後，第一次使用請先輸入：\n\n: After successful installation, please enter the following for first-time use:
translations.官方給的解決方法「 [Distributed counters](https:/: The official solution "[Distributed counters](https://cloud.google.com/firestore/docs/solutions/counters#node.js_2){:target="_blank"}" is not very complicated. It simply uses multiple distributed likeCount fields for counting, then sums them up when reading.
translations.就會看到剛剛撰寫的接口和網址位置。\n\n: You will see the interface and URL location you just created.
translations.建立一個可新增、修改、刪除、查詢文章和按讚的 API\n\n: Create an API to add, update, delete, query articles, and like posts
translations.我們可以在程式碼中使用：\n\n: We can use in the code:
translations.我們希望能達成 Restful API 的功能設計，所以不能再使用上面範例的純: We want to achieve RESTful API design, so we can no longer use the pure Path method from the example above. Instead, we need to use the `Express` framework.
translations.新增、修改、刪除做完了，來做查詢！\n\n: Create, update, and delete are done, now let's do the query!
translations.最近想為 APP 導入的功能，未實作前我們只能從後端 Post 資料給 APNS: Recently, for a feature we want to add to the app, before implementation, we could only use the backend's success or failure response when posting data to APNS/FCM as the push notification base, and record push clicks to calculate the "click rate." However, this method is very inaccurate because the base includes many invalid devices, such as deleted apps (which may not become invalid immediately) and devices with push permissions turned off, which still return success when posting from the backend.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.有時候我們需要當值存在時做更新，當值不存在時新增，這時候可以用 `set` 搭配: Sometimes we need to update when the document exists, and create it when it doesn't. In this case, we can use `set` with `merge: true`:
translations.現在我們改用 Express 來處理網路請求，這邊先新增一個 路徑 `/ 的 P: Now we switch to using Express to handle web requests. Here, we first add a POST method for the `/` path. The last line indicates that all routes are under `/post`. Next, we will add APIs for update and delete.
translations.用在 API 就是我可以寫一個 node.js 檔案，得到一個實體 URL (e: For APIs, I can write a node.js file to get a physical URL (e.g., my-project.cloudfunctions.net/getUser) and implement the logic to retrieve Request information and provide the corresponding Response.
translations.當推播統計遇上 Firebase Firestore + Functions\n: When Push Notification Statistics Meet Firebase Firestore + Functions
translations.結合 Firebase Functions 可在 Request 時 impor: Combining Firebase Functions allows you to import Firestore during a request to operate the database, then respond to the user, enabling you to build a simple RESTful API service!
translations.複製下方網址貼到 PostMan 測試：\n\n: Copy the URL below and paste it into PostMan to test:
translations.記下 Firebase init 所在路徑：\n\n: Note the path where Firebase init is located:
translations.貼上以上內容，我們定義了一個路徑接口 `/hello` 然後會回傳 URL **: We defined a route `/hello` that returns URL **Query** `?targetID=`, **POST** `action`, and `name` parameter information.
translations.這時候可以回到 Firebase -> Functions 頁面：\n\n: At this point, you can return to the Firebase -> Functions page:
translations.這邊以新增 tag 為例，部署＆測試方式如新增，可以看到 Firestore 不: Here, using adding a tag as an example, the deployment and testing method is the same as adding new data. You can see that Firestore does not repeatedly add new entries.
translations.這邊可以選擇要安裝的 Firebase CLI 工具，按 「↑」「↓」進行選擇，: Here you can choose which Firebase CLI tools to install. Use the "↑" and "↓" keys to navigate and the "spacebar" to select. You can choose to install only "Functions" or include "Firestore" as well.
translations.這邊建議使用 NVM，node.js 版本管理工具進行安裝管理（像 python: It is recommended to use NVM, a Node.js version manager, for installation and management (similar to using pyenv for Python).
translations.這邊選擇的是 APP 幾乎都會使用的 Firebase 服務，其中的 Funct: Here, we choose Firebase services that are commonly used by apps, specifically the Functions and Firestore features.
translations.運用 `increment` 這個變數就能直接做到取出值 +1 的動作。\n\n: Using the `increment` variable allows you to directly perform the operation of value +1.
translations.部署＆測試方式如新增，Post Man Http Method 記得改成 `DE: Deployment & testing method is the same as adding; remember to change the Post Man HTTP Method to `DELETE`.
translations.部署＆測試方式如新增，Post Man Http Method 記得改成 `GE: Deployment & testing method is the same as adding; remember to change the Postman HTTP Method to `GET` and set the `Body` back to `none`.
translations.部署＆測試方式如新增，Post Man Http Method 記得改成 `PU: Deployment & testing method is the same as adding; remember to change the Post Man HTTP Method to `PUT`.
translations.關於「use ESLint to catch probable bugs and: Regarding "use ESLint to catch probable bugs and enforce style" syntax style checking, **YES / NO both are acceptable**.
